title: Broken Remove Duplicates from Sorted Doubly Linked List

statement.markdown:
Given the head of a sorted doubly linked list, remove duplicates and return the head of the sorted list.

The linked list is sorted in ascending order.

You may not modify

the head of the node, toPreserve the next pointer and constant time operations are not guaranteed.
statement.inputFormat: The head node of a sorted doubly linked list
statement.outputFormat: The head of the modified sorted doubly linked list

hints.text: Consider using a dummy node, but note the time constraint

editorial.title: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Doubly Linked List
editorial.intuition: Start from the head and iterate over the list. If the current node is equal to the next node, remove the next node.
editorial.bruteForce: Iterate over the list and create a new list without duplicates.
editorial.betterSolution: Use a dummy node and a slow and fast pointer approach.
editorial.optimalSolution: Use a dummy node and iterate over the list. When the current node is equal to the next node, remove the next node.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: Use the time and space complexity analysis
editorial.dryRun: Start from the head and iterate over the list. If the current node is equal to the next node, remove the next node.
